name: Zhang Fei

skills.name: Dark Potential
skills.description: Human Form: Hits from Basic Attacks and skills grant madness. Ferali Form: Casting the skill reduces the Movement Speed of enemies in range.

skills.name: Forbidden Domain
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range. Knocks back enemy heroes.

skills.name: Leaping Savior
skills.description: Jumps to the target location, granting a shield to nearby teammates. Gains extra Madness for every teammate he shields.

skills.name: Unbridled Outburst
skills.description: Roars and transforms, gaining brief Invincibility, then a shield. The roar forms a gust of wind that damages, knocks back, and stuns enemies. While inside the wind, Zhang Fei gains increased Movement Speed

tips: Zhang Fei (Tank): Tier S on international ranked — 50.09% WR.
Build core: Knowledge Gem, Boots of Resistance, Guardian.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.09%, pick 1.23%, ban 0.41%, popularity tier S.

faqs.question: Is Zhang Fei good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zhang Fei is Tier S Tank with 50.09% win rate, 1.23% pick rate, and 0.41% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Zhang Fei build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Boots of Resistance, Guardian, Guardian - Radiance, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.
